title: <div><tt>  - Do 15–20 “last‑mile” questions per day from apps or Barron’s, focus
content:
- Do 15–20 “last‑mile” questions per day from apps or Barron’s, focusing only on previously missed question types.
- Day 6 (or the day before the real exam):
- Very light work: one short untimed quiz, plus 30–45 minutes of relaxed audio review while walking or doing chores; no cramming.

**End‑of‑plan checkpoint:**
- She should be consistently scoring 85–90%+ on recent practice tests and feel comfortable with NY license law, fair housing, agency, and math; if any category is still below that, she can extend by one more focused week before sitting the exam.[6][7][11][12]

Sources
[1] NY Real Estate School Courses & Products https://dearborn.com/real-estate-schools/new-york-products
[2] Modern Real Estate Practice in New York for Salespersons, 14th ... https://www.campusbooks.com/books/9781078838900-modern-real-estate-practice-in-new-york-for-salespersons-14th-edition-including-26-unit-quizzes-highlighted-key-terms-math-references-and-a-detailed-glossary-dearborn-real-estate-education
context: From document: Since she has prior experience and is coming back after a lapse, this… — chunk 5 (chunk 5/8)
